heroCapture: Select a source to verify human presence.
heroProcessing: Running anti-spoofing analysis via Verifik API…
chooseOneDescription: Scan with your camera or upload a photo. Either option works for this liveness check.
cameraSubtitle: Open the camera and align your face in the frame
uploadSubtitle: Select an image file from your device instead
uploadSecondary: JPEG or PNG from your gallery
samplesDescription: Tap a portrait to run liveness on a stock photo (same as uploading).
defaultPass: The subject passed Verifik liveness verification.
defaultFail: The image did not pass anti-spoofing checks.
apiRefBody: This demo calls POST /v2/face-recognition/liveness with os and image (base64). Pass/fail uses liveness_score against min_score (default {defaultMin} when liveness_min_score is omitted).
apiRefEndpointDesc: Returns a liveness score and passed when the score exceeds the minimum threshold.
paramImageDesc: Base64 image (or https URL; server may fetch)
bulletSignature: Responses include id and a signature block alongside data.
